title: Algorithms & Data Struc II
description: Object-oriented design: inheritance, interfaces, polymorphism; problem analysis; recursion; abstract data types; dynamically linked structures; data structures: stacks, queues, lists, trees, maps, etc.

objectives: Establish an understanding of interfaces, inheritance, and polymorphism.
Establish an understanding of recursion and recursive programming.
Establish an understanding of the following data structures, including the specification, implementation, and use of each: lists, stacks, queues, collections, sets, maps, and trees.
Establish an understanding of basic algorithm analysis issues, including time/space tradeoffs and algorithm growth rates.

textbook.title: Data Structures and Algorithm Analysis in Java (3rd Edition)
textbook.description: Reference text for algorithm analysis, abstract data types, and efficient Java implementations.

classSchedule.topic: Welcome, Review of Basic Algorithm and Objects & Class
List and Implementation using Array, Collection
List and Implementation using Linked List, Midterm Review
General Tree and Binary Search Tree
